zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel於1475年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，她的父親Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron35歲，母親Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell35歲。她於1495年之前與Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1547年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾哈里斯享年72歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德丁瓦爾聖 克萊門茨 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel于1475年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾时，她的父亲Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron35岁，母亲Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell35岁。她于1495年之前与Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin在苏格兰阿吉爾阿波结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1547年在苏格兰音巴內-爾哈里斯享年72岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德丁瓦爾聖 克萊門茨 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel was born in 1475, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron, was 35 and her mother, Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, was 35. She married Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin before 1495, in Appin, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1547, in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel est née en 1475, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin avant 1495, à Appin, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1547, à Harris, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel 1475 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron 35 und ihre Mutter Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell 35. Sie hat vor 1495 in Appin, Argyll, Scotland Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1547 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel è nata il nel 1475 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin prima del 1495, nel Appin, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1547, nel Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochielが1475年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameronは35歳，母Marriott of Keppoch MacDonellは35歳であった。1495年以前にスコットランドアルグイルアップインでAllan Stewart 3rd of Appinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1547年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアハーリスで72歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドディングワルサイント クレメンツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel(이)가 1475년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1495년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이 애핀에서 Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 해리스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 딩월 세인트 클레멘츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel nasceu em 1475, em Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin antes 1495, em Appin, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1547, em Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel родилась в 1475 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin перед 1495 г. в местности эппин, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1547 г. в местности харрис, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт клеменц чурчярд, дингвалл, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Cameron of Lochiel nació en 1475, en Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Allan MacIldny Cameron 12th Chief of Clan Cameron, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marriott of Keppoch MacDonell, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Allan Stewart 3rd of Appin antes de 1495, en Appin, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1547, en Harris, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Saint Clements Churchyard, Dingwall, Highland, Escocia, Reino Unido.
